message:
feat(security): implement sender identity verification

Port sender_token / verified_sender mechanism from Python version.
Prevents agent impersonation — any agent could previously send messages
as any other agent by simply providing a different sender_name.

Implementation:
- Generate 256-bit cryptographic registration token on register_agent
  and create_agent_identity (getrandom + base64url, 43 chars)
- Store registration_token in agents table (new column + migration)
- Validate sender_token on send_message with constant-time comparison
  (XOR-fold, prevents timing side-channels)
- Token match → verified_sender: true
- Token mismatch → SENDER_TOKEN_MISMATCH error (impersonation blocked)
- Token omitted → verified_sender: false (graceful degradation)
- Token never exposed in whois or public queries

Closes #42

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
